metadata.name: Check Network Capacity Before Adding Service

description: Before sales can sell a large new service, the agent must verify there is enough network capacity to support it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the bandwidth requirements for the new service from the service catalog.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the new service requires 10 Gbps of dedicated bandwidth.

nodes.task_description: Check the current utilization of the edge router that will serve the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the router has 20 Gbps of available capacity.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that there is sufficient capacity and notify the sales team that they can proceed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a confirmation to the sales team.
